title: LOUISIANA AIR CONTROL LAW
doc_html:
CHAPTER 3.  LOUISIANA AIR CONTROL LAW

§2051.  Citation

This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Louisiana Air Control Law."

Acts 1979, No. 449, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1980.
